lessons_learned.lesson: Autonomous overnight builds are the system working as designed. Junction went from 24 → 121 pages while Tom slept. The constraint is NOT agent capacity — it's deployment blockers (GitHub auth, DNS). Solve infrastructure blockers FIRST, then agents can compound freely.

Payment crisis accumulates silently but catastrophically. Day 10 of IRD debt means real penalties. Every day of inaction costs real money. Systemic fix (dedicated subscription card with buffer) > reactive firefighting.

Post-production guides unlock execution. ALTERNATE agent converted blocking time into a complete step-by-step brief. Tom's 2.5h session is now structured + efficient instead of ambiguous. Structure = speed.

Internal linking multiplies SEO value. Connecting 15 city pages to 9 service pages creates a dense authority web. Each new page strengthens all existing pages. Junction now has a proper SEO architecture, not just isolated content.

collaboration_rating.notes: Outstanding autonomous overnight operation. Junction Agent shipped 75 blog posts + 11 industry pages + 9 service pages + full internal linking without any Tom interaction. ALTERNATE Agent completed post-production guide to make Tom's edit session frictionless. Personal Agent tracked everything silently. The machine is running at full capacity — human action is now the only constraint.
highlights: 99 commits shipped overnight by Junction Agent autonomously
ALTERNATE converted 'waiting' into complete post-production infrastructure
All blockers consolidated and prioritised clearly for Tom's morning
